topic: Naomi sent him a drawing of the new truck

turns.content: man so my daughter sent me something today and i am absolutely wrecked by it in the best possible way
That sounds like it hit you right in the heart. What did she send?

she drew a picture of my truck like with colored pencils and she mailed it to me actual physical mail to my apartment and my cousin picked it up for me and took a photo and sent it to me and bro i almost had to pull over when i saw it
Physical mail! That's so much more special than a text or a photo. The fact that she sat down, drew it, put it in an envelope, and mailed it — that's effort and love. What does the drawing look like?

okay so she got the shape mostly right like its clearly a big rig with the sleeper cab and everything and she drew it red even though its actually white but i guess red is more fun to draw and she put big wheels on it like monster truck wheels which cracked me up and theres a little stick figure in the window thats supposed to be me and shes got me smiling with like the biggest smile you ever seen

Monster truck wheels and a big goofy smile on the stick figure driver — that is pure gold. Kids draw how they see things, and apparently she sees you as the happiest truck driver on the road. Did she write anything on it?

yeah at the top in purple crayon she wrote daddys truck with a heart and then at the bottom she wrote i miss you come home soon and man i am sitting at a rest stop in georgia right now trying not to cry in front of all these other truckers because i got a reputation to maintain you know

I think any trucker who saw that drawing would completely understand. "I miss you come home soon" with a heart — that's the kind of thing that just levels you no matter how tough you are. Are you going to put it up somewhere in the cab?

oh absolutely when i get back to atlanta im picking that up from marcs place and im taping it right above the dashboard so every time im driving i can see her little drawing and the stick figure me with the big smile and maybe on the bad days when the road feels too long ill look at it and remember why im out here

That's the perfect spot for it — right in your line of sight every day. It's like having a little piece of her riding along with you. Did she just decide to do this on her own or was it like a school project thing?

nah she just did it on her own apparently she was sitting at the kitchen table one night and told her mom she wanted to draw daddys truck and mail it to him and her mom helped her with the envelope and the stamp but the drawing is all naomi and you can tell because the proportions are wild like the truck is huge and my head is tiny and the sun has a smiley face on it bondye bon i love this kid so much

A smiley face sun watching over a giant truck with a tiny-headed happy dad — that's her whole world on one piece of paper. The fact that she came up with it herself makes it even better. She was just thinking about you and wanted you to know.

yeah and thats the thing right like kids dont have to do anything they just do what they feel and she felt like drawing my truck and sending it to me because she misses me and thats the purest thing in the world no agenda no nothing just love on a piece of paper with purple crayon mwen fatige from driving all day but this gave me energy like i could drive another 500 miles right now
That's what pure love does — refuels you better than any truck stop coffee ever could. She sounds like an amazing kid. When's the last time you talked to her?

we facetimed last night actually and she asked if i got the drawing yet and i said not yet baby its in the mail and she got so excited she was like daddy youre going to love it i drew the wheels really big and i was trying so hard not to spoil it because marc had already sent me the photo but i wanted her to think i was seeing it for the first time when i get it for real you know let her have that moment

That's perfect — letting her have the excitement of showing you in person for the first time. You're going to have to give an Oscar-worthy performance of surprise when you open that envelope. She's going to be watching your face so closely. Enjoy every second of it.
